Annotation.String: Represents a marker in Publication Structure indicating where a TOC would appear in published output
Used to reference Dynamic Documents which are illustration files.
An abstract base type derived from WTPart for any and all Publication Structure and Information Structure objects.
Represents a division or section in the Information Structure. Used to define hierarchy and organize content.
References Dynamic Documents which are the content files. This is meant to be a generic content holder type to associate with any kind of content.
Used to reference Dynamic Documents which are textual content files (XML, PDF, etc).
Represents a marker in Publication Structure indicating where an Index would appear in published output
Part Usage between service structure nodes
Represents a section in the Publication Structure. Used to define hierarchy and organize content
Class used for grouping Information Elements together in Information and Publication structures
References Dynamic Documents. Used to reference Dynamic Documents which can be illustration files or Textual.
Used for representing Authoring language attribute.
